transcript.clean_text: Stage four of the tour of a man taking the riders from the seaside resort of alseif annuity to the Amman convention an exhibition centre a stage short and fast 131 kilometers of racing a far start with lots of breakaways the riders could think of two possibilities at the end of today's stage a big bunch sprint for a small group of riders going all the way to the line eventually three attackers managing to get to the front joined by a fourth they men go down racing across a one final rider Jeremy Laveau of Delco Marseille making it into the group to join van hooijdonk at a puma and also he impose well the climb started to hurt the legs Jeremy Laveau was dropped first the pace being set in the peloton by CCC go down the classic specialist also to come to the power of the climbers the peloton in one long line racing towards the finish time running out the time gap still intact for the three attackers the running to the finish line the gap tantalizingly close and the crosswind starting to hurt one kilometer to go at a puma with a final surge but as you desire him on the Isle with Oliver Nelson taking the race on and then the sprint for the line with the Olympic champion Greg Van alamat going first electing sonica Braley in on the right hand side called Braley wins for Bahrain Morita a thrilling victory for the Italian powerhouse he takes the win top step of the podium ahead of Greg Van a Vermette enfant Houdini it's still red for this man it's Green Mountain tomorrow
